The '''Gizer L-6 freighter''' was a class of [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] developed on [[Gizer/Legends|Gizer]] that was used predominantly during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] as a civilian [[Transport/Legends|transport]] craft. [[Omega Squad]] was tasked to interdict a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] Gizer L-6 freighter in [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]]. The mission was a near disaster.

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]''
